name: Sydney
industries: Banking transformation, the Tech Central precinct and a decade-long infrastructure pipeline drive certified hiring.
intro: Sydney's project market is Australia's deepest: the banks' transformation portfolios run from Barangaroo, Tech Central is assembling the southern hemisphere's largest technology precinct, and a metro-and-motorway infrastructure pipeline keeps program roles filled for a decade ahead. Certification is priced into salaries openly — Scrum credentials for the digital delivery world, PMP for infrastructure and financial governance. You can join a live online cohort in Sydney year-round, on either a weekend Sat–Sun or a midweek Wed–Thu schedule, both timed for comfortable Sydney daytime rather than awkward hours; exact converted timings for each upcoming date appear in the table below. The format regardless: live weekend instruction, exam application support, full-length mocks, and trainer access until you pass. Sydney cohorts routinely mix bankers, consultants and public-sector delivery leads comparing practice across sectors.

faq.q: What are the class timings in Sydney?
faq.a: Live classes run 09:00 AM – 06:00 PM AET, which is 09:00 AM – 06:00 PM GMT+10 in Sydney. You can pick a weekend (Sat–Sun) or a weekday (Wed–Thu) cohort; each completes the course over two consecutive days.

faq.q: Is the training online or at a venue in Sydney?
faq.a: All batches are 100% live online, taught by an instructor over video with interactive exercises — there is no venue to travel to in Sydney. You need a laptop, a stable connection and a free weekend.

faq.q: Is the certificate different if I attend from Australia?
faq.a: No. The certification is issued by the same global body regardless of where you attend from, and holds identical recognition with employers in Australia and internationally.

faq.q: Can my employer in Sydney sponsor the course?
faq.a: Yes. We issue invoices suitable for corporate sponsorship and reimbursement, and most employers in Australia accept them under learning and development budgets. Group pricing is available for teams.

meta.title: {course} Training in Sydney — Live Online Weekend Batches
meta.description: Live online {course} certification training for Sydney: upcoming weekend batch dates in your local time, salary data with sources, and exam cost.
